---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new pattern, guide, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What Pattern or Guide

Describe the pattern, guide, or improvement you'd like to see added.

## Why It's Useful

What real-world problem does this solve? Include context from production experience if possible.

## Proposed Location

Where in the repository structure should this live? (e.g., `core/`, `claude/`, `infrastructure/`)

## Examples

Include concrete examples, before/after comparisons, or references to existing documentation that covers this topic.
